ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the city information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the country information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city this weather data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date this weather data was recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded */,
  "cloudiness" REAL /* Cloudiness recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility recorded in kilometers */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the weather data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city this weather station is located in */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the weather station was maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the weather station information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected by this source */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_sources" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_retrieval_time" TEXT /* Time the data was retrieved from the source */,
  "data_retrieval_status" TEXT /* Status of the data retrieval */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city this weather forecast is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date this weather forecast was made */,
  "max_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature */,
  "min_temp_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature */,
  "humidity_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted humidity */,
  "cloudiness_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted cloudiness */,
  "wind_speed_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the forecast was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city this weather alert is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date this weather alert was issued */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the weather alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather alert */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station this reading is from */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date this reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index recorded */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the reading was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_readings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station this sensor is part of */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Last date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the sensor information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data this version is for */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date this version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
